_meta.note: All metrics computed from LOVO (leave-one-VIN-out) out-of-fold predictions, NOT full-fit probabilities

auroc_decomposition.interpretation: P(failed truck ranked above healthy truck on a randomly drawn pair)

threshold_metrics.brier_note: brier_raw uses ridge_prob directly (already [0,1]); brier_sigmoid uses sigmoid(logit(ridge_prob)) for completeness

top_k_accuracy.note: Trucks ranked in top 10 by LOVO score (25 trucks total); 10 are truly failed

spearman_rank_corr.note: Spearman rho between ridge_prob score and binary truth label

concordance_index.note: For binary outcomes, concordance index = AUROC (stated equality)

external_stats_note: bootstrap_auroc_mean, bootstrap_95ci, permutation_p_value cited from V10.5.3 ridge_spec.json; not recomputed here

mean_lead_time_days.note: GED=2 excitation-disturbance channel only; only 2/10 failed trucks emit this signal

framing.practical: 93% ranking AUROC on trucks the model never saw
framing.business: 0 false alarms in healthy fleet; the top-10 inspection list catches 9/10 failures
framing.recommendation: Communicate the 93% as ranking accuracy AND pair it with '9/10 caught, 0 false alarms'; never present it as bare classification accuracy
